title: euonymus oxyphyllus
intro: Euonymus oxyphyllus, also known as the strawberry tree or strawberry bush, is a plant species in the Euonymus genus. It is native to China and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's roots, leaves, and stems contain various compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Euonymus oxyphyllus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
